prompt: A soft pastel watercolor anime illustration of a young elf girl sitting on a bed in a quiet sunlit bedroom, viewed from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle. She has {argument name="hair color" default="warm orange"} shoulder-length hair with soft layered strands, large blue eyes, pale skin, and long pointed elf ears. A red flower hair clip decorates the left side of her hair. Her expression is calm and dreamy as she gazes upward toward the bright light on the right side of the image. She wears a loose sage-green chiffon dress with ruffled trim, sheer puffed long sleeves, gathered ribbon details at the chest, and a black lace camisole visible underneath, plus a thin red choker with a small pendant and dark thigh-high stockings. She is posed seated near the edge of a lavender bedspread, leaning back with both hands resting on the mattress behind her, legs extended diagonally toward the lower right. The room is delicate and minimal: 1 bed with 2 white pillows, 1 wooden headboard or bedside surface behind her, 1 window on the left, 1 small potted plant on the windowsill, and flowing lavender curtains. Strong warm sunlight floods the scene from the right, creating a large glowing white area and gentle washed-out highlights. Use an airy handmade watercolor look with visible paper grain, soft bleeding edges, pastel lilac and cream shadows, subtle sparkled pigment texture, and a serene fantasy slice-of-life mood.
translatedPrompt: 一幅柔和的粉彩水彩动漫插画，描绘了一位年轻的精灵少女坐在安静且阳光明媚的卧室床上，视角为略微俯视的三分之四侧面。她拥有 {argument name="hair color" default="暖橙色"} 的齐肩发，发丝层次柔和，有着大大的蓝色眼睛、白皙的皮肤和长长的尖耳朵。左侧头发上别着一个红色花朵发夹。她神情宁静而梦幻，凝视着画面右侧的明亮光线。她穿着一件宽松的鼠尾草绿雪纺连衣裙，带有荷叶边装饰、透明的泡泡长袖、胸前有褶皱丝带细节，内搭黑色蕾丝吊带背心，并佩戴着一条带有小吊坠的红色细颈圈，穿着深色过膝袜。她坐在薰衣草色床罩的边缘附近，双手向后撑在床垫上，双腿向右下方斜伸。房间精致简约：1 张床配 2 个白色枕头，她身后有 1 个木制床头板或床头平面，左侧有 1 扇窗户，窗台上放着 1 盆小植物，并挂着飘逸的薰衣草色窗帘。强烈的暖阳从右侧倾泻而入，营造出一大片明亮的光晕和柔和的褪色高光。采用轻盈的手绘水彩风格，呈现可见的纸张纹理、柔和的晕染边缘、淡紫色和奶油色的阴影、细腻的闪光颜料质感，以及宁静的奇幻生活氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 阳光卧室里的水彩精灵少女：此提示词可生成一幅梦幻般的水彩动漫肖像，描绘了一位坐在床上的精灵少女，非常适合用于奇幻角色艺术、柔和插画印刷品或氛围感概念图。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, fantasy, watercolor]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
